methods.name: initialize
methods.desc: Opt the app into the currency ASA. Called by the factory after funding.

methods.name: register_dispute
methods.desc: Register external dispute details. Resolution-authority-only, DISPUTED status only.

methods.name: creator_resolve_dispute
methods.desc: Creator adjudicates the dispute. Creator-only, DISPUTED status only.

methods.name: admin_resolve_dispute
methods.desc: Market admin adjudicates the dispute as final fallback. Admin-only, DISPUTED status only.

methods.name: finalize_dispute
methods.desc: Finalize a dispute with a ruling. Resolution-authority-only, DISPUTED status only.

methods.name: cancel_dispute_and_market
methods.desc: Cancel a disputed market (irresolvable). Resolution-authority-only, DISPUTED status only.

methods.name: withdraw_protocol_fees
methods.desc: Withdraw accumulated protocol fees to the configured protocol treasury.
